# No insurance? New patients enjoy a $29 exam and X-rays.¹

## Dental care that shows up for you

Get guided, expert care at every step—made easy, affordable and on your terms.

![Icon](https://cdn.bfldr.com/LP3GHVAP/as/9t49jb5cpz32g2cqx776mz/Same-day_appointments)

### Same-day appointments

Get in fast with [flexible hours](https://www.aspendental.com/schedule-an-appointment/) that fit your life.

![Icon](https://cdn.bfldr.com/LP3GHVAP/as/s3pxh6vr7qj8qf57pnzjzmc/Most_insurance_accepted)

### Most insurance accepted

Use your [coverage](https://www.aspendental.com/dental-insurance/) confidently (Note: Medicaid not accepted).

![Icon](https://cdn.bfldr.com/LP3GHVAP/as/jzqkfcnh4w4r54xc3k6fcc/Made_affordable_for_you_cash)

### Flexible financing options

Apply for [3rd-party financing](https://www.aspendental.com/pricing-offers/dental-financing/) in 3 easy steps at your visit.

![Icon](https://cdn.bfldr.com/LP3GHVAP/as/rb698xsq4bt8thxxtqwgb38/Industry-leading_doctors)

### Industry-leading doctors

We’ve spent 25+ years enhancing the dental process.

## Try on your best smile

Snap a photo to preview what Aspen Dental can do for your smile. And your life.

[Preview your smile](https://www.aspendental.com/smile-try-on/)

Book a [check-up](https://www.aspendental.com/dental-services/preventive-dentistry/dental-checkup/), explore [dentures](https://www.aspendental.com/dentures/) and restore your confidence with [implants](https://www.aspendental.com/dental-implants/)—all at your [local Aspen Dental](https://www.aspendental.com/dentist/)

## Still have questions?

Not sure what to expect, how to pay or if it’s been too long since your last visit? Let us help.

[Explore FAQseast](https://www.aspendental.com/patient-resources/faq/)

### Can I book an exam even if I haven’t seen the dentist in years?add\_circle\_outline

Yes, absolutely. You’re welcome here, no matter how long it’s been. Life gets busy, things fall to the bottom of the list—that’s normal. We’ll take a full look at your teeth and gums, talk honestly about what we see and build a plan that helps you move forward without judgment.

### What happens at my first visit?add\_circle\_outline

Your first visit is about getting the full picture. We’ll review your oral health history, take any needed X-rays and do a thorough exam of your teeth and gums. Then your dentist at Aspen Dental will walk you through what they found, explain your options in plain language and recommend the right type of care plan so you know exactly what comes next.

### Do you accept same-day or emergency appointments?add\_circle\_outline

Many Aspen Dental offices offer same-day or next-day appointments, especially if you’re in pain or have a cracked or broken tooth. Call your local office or schedule online and let us know it’s urgent—we’ll do our best to get you in quickly. If you’re dealing with heavy bleeding, trouble breathing or a serious injury, call 911 or go to the nearest ER right away.

### Does Aspen Dental take my insurance?add\_circle\_outline

We work with most dental insurance plans to help lower your out-of-pocket costs. (We don’t accept Medicaid.) At your visit, we’ll review your benefits, answer questions and share an estimate before you move forward with treatment. If you don’t have insurance, or need help spreading payments out, we can also talk through 3rd-party financing options so care can still fit your budget.

### What if I’m nervous about going to the dentist?add\_circle\_outline

You’re not the only one who feels that way. From the moment you check in, we’ll explain each step before it happens, check in on how you’re doing and move at a pace that feels comfortable. If you know you’re especially anxious, tell us when you schedule—your care team can plan extra time, answer questions up front and focus on keeping the visit as calm and easy as possible.

Your Office
